sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for PC version

special_mechanics.name: Ledge Grab and Climb
special_mechanics.description: Conrad can grab onto ledges and climb, requiring precise positioning on non-scrolling screens with multiple altitude levels

special_mechanics.name: Fall Damage
special_mechanics.description: Conrad dies if he falls from a great height, indicating realistic fall physics with lethal threshold

special_mechanics.name: Elevator Traversal
special_mechanics.description: Player can use elevators to navigate between altitude levels

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. Game is known for rotoscoped animation with fluid, human-like movement. Exact numerical physics parameters not documented in available sources. Movement characteristics derived from design documentation emphasizing realistic human physics simulation.
